input.headline: Black Friday deals for him that will make the perfect present

raw.headline: Black Friday deals for him that will make the perfect present

winner: Black Friday deals for him that will make the perfect present — just don't forget to wrap the guilt.

candidates.text: Why did Santa’s gift list have a red line through every item? Because he read the fine print and realized "Black Friday" was just code for "We’ll charge you more later.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on Black Friday, specific to the headline, concise, and uses a familiar holiday figure with a clever punchline."}

candidates.text: I bought my husband the perfect Black Friday gift, but it turns out the only thing he actually liked was the "Free Shipping" offer.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on the typical Black Friday gift joke, concise and specific with a relatable situation."}

candidates.text: I told my husband I wanted a gift that would truly represent him—he said he’d prefer one he could give to himself on Black Friday.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with a specific scenario, concise and naturally funny."}

candidates.text: I bought him a black suit, a pair of shoes, and a manual on how to use a remote control — turns out, Black Friday was the perfect time to get him ready for his first Zoom meeting.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with tech-related humor and specific context"}

candidates.text: I bought a Black Friday deal for my husband, but I'm having trouble wrapping it because it keeps trying to steal the gift ribbon from the neighbor.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is clever with a surprising twist involving the gift ribbon and the item trying to steal it, which adds humor. It's specific and concise, though the humor could be slightly more refined for maximum impact."}

candidates.text: Black Friday deals for him that will make the perfect present — just don't forget to wrap the guilt.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with 'guilt' adds humor, concise and specific to the context."}

candidates.text: Why did the man get kicked out of Black Friday shopping? Because he kept saying "I'll just take half off!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the play on 'half off,' but it lacks specificity and the setup could be more surprising or tightly connected to the headline."}

candidates.text: I bought my husband a Black Friday deal for his new job, but he’s still upset that I didn't let him pick the "dark" humor.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke has some humor with the play on 'dark' humor, but it's a bit forced and lacks specificity in connecting the Black Friday deal to the job. It also feels slightly generic."}

candidates.text: The best Black Friday deal for him? A coupon for a free return.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat surprising and specific, but the humor is weak and relies on a negative twist that may not land well for all audiences."}
